testcase.name: test_invite_report_conversion_rates_calculated

failure.message: AssertionError: accept_rate should be 0-100 assert 600.0 <= 100 + where 600.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa20196c1c80>('accept_rate', -1) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa20196c1c80> = {'accept_rate': 600.0, 'invites_accepted': 6, 'invites_opened': 1, 'invites_sent': 7, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_invite_tracking.py:99: in test_invite_report_conversion_rates_calculated assert 0 <= data.get("accept_rate", -1) <= 100, "accept_rate should be 0-100" E AssertionError: accept_rate should be 0-100 E assert 600.0 <= 100 E + where 600.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa20196c1c80>('accept_rate', -1) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa20196c1c80> = {'accept_rate': 600.0, 'invites_accepted': 6, 'invites_opened': 1, 'invites_sent': 7, ...}.get
